scripts.test: pnpm --filter emoji-styles-data build && pnpm --filter emoji-styles build && pnpm --filter @emoji-styles/asset-pipeline build && pnpm --filter emoji-styles-cli build && pnpm --filter react-emoji-styles build && pnpm -r test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter emoji-styles-data build && pnpm --filter emoji-styles build && pnpm --filter @emoji-styles/asset-pipeline build && pnpm --filter emoji-styles-cli build && pnpm -r typecheck
